about.title: Your opinion has value. We make sure you get paid for it.
about.paragraph1: Brands spend billions understanding what people want. We think the people doing the telling deserve a fair cut — not points that expire or vague "rewards."
about.paragraph2: Real cash, transparent rewards, and privacy you control. That's the whole idea.
about.photoAlt: A member completing a survey on their phone

items.name: Maya R.
items.headline: Cashed out $50 in my first month
items.text: I do surveys on my commute. The payouts are real and land in PayPal within the hour. No points nonsense.

items.name: Devin K.
items.headline: Finally, surveys that respect my time
items.text: Every survey tells you the reward and length upfront. If I don't qualify, I'm out in seconds — not ten minutes.

items.name: Priya S.
items.headline: The gift card bonuses are unreal
items.text: 5% extra on Amazon cards adds up fast. I've basically covered my coffee budget for a year.

items.name: Tom B.
items.headline: Legit and actually pays
items.text: Was skeptical at first but the $5 minimum cashout and instant PayPal made me a believer. Been using it daily.

items.name: Ana L.
items.headline: Clean app, zero spam
items.text: The interface feels like a proper iOS app, not some sketchy rewards site. My data stays private too.

items.name: Jordan M.
items.headline: My favorite downtime earner
items.text: Better than mindless scrolling. I've made over $200 answering questions about stuff I already have opinions on.

faq.title: Questions? Answered.
faq.moreText: Still have questions? We've got more answers waiting.

items.question: Is it really free to join?
items.answer: Yes — 100% free, forever. There are no sign-up fees, no subscriptions, and no withdrawal fees. You keep every cent you earn.

items.question: How much can I earn?
items.answer: It varies by how many surveys you qualify for, but most members earn between $30 and $150 a month doing surveys in their spare time. The more complete your profile, the more surveys you match.

items.question: How do I get paid?
items.answer: Cash out to PayPal, bank transfer, or over 100 gift card options (Amazon, Starbucks, Steam and more) once you reach a $5 balance. Most payouts arrive within minutes.

items.question: Is my data safe?
items.answer: Absolutely. Your responses are anonymized and never sold to third parties. We use bank-grade encryption and are fully GDPR compliant — and you can delete your account and data at any time.

items.question: How long do surveys take?
items.answer: Most take under five minutes. Every survey shows the exact reward and estimated time before you start, so you're never caught out.

items.question: What if I don't qualify for a survey?
items.answer: You'll usually know within the first few questions, and we design it so you're screened out quickly. We're always working to match you with surveys you'll qualify for.

cta.subtitle: Join 1.9M+ members turning their opinions into real cash. No fees, no catch.
